missing_wiring.issue: Text mode handleSend() calls /api/conversation directly instead of routing through useRealtimeVella.sendTextMessage(). Text mode persona does not reflect realtime deliveryMeta, emotionalState, behaviourVector, or current toneStyle/language settings.
missing_wiring.required_connection: Route text mode messages through useRealtimeVella.sendTextMessage(). Ensure toneStyle, language, relationshipMode from userSettings.vella are consumed by realtime pipeline.

missing_wiring.issue: storyMode, cadence, variability, sarcasmSoftness are stored in VellaSettings, persisted to Supabase, displayed as 'Deprecated' placeholder, but NOT wired to personaSynth or useRealtimeVella.
missing_wiring.required_connection: Either remove these fields entirely from VellaSettings and database, OR wire them properly to personaSynth.buildPersonaInstruction() if they should influence delivery.

missing_wiring.issue: selectedTone state is initialized from loadLocalMemory() on mount and updated via setSelectedTone() when ToneSelector changes, but NOT syncing with userSettings.vella?.toneStyle when settings change elsewhere.
missing_wiring.required_connection: Add useEffect to sync selectedTone with userSettings.vella?.toneStyle. Remove initialization from loadLocalMemory() - use userSettings.vella?.toneStyle ?? 'soft' instead.

missing_wiring.issue: Legacy ToneSelector component does NOT call updateVellaSettings() - it only calls optional onChange callback. There is a separate components/ui/ToneSelector.tsx that properly wires to updateVellaSettings.
missing_wiring.required_connection: Verify if components/settings/ToneSelector.tsx is imported anywhere. If unused, delete it. If used, ensure it calls updateVellaSettings({ toneStyle: tone }).

missing_wiring.issue: File marked @deprecated but still exports. Should be removed or replaced.
missing_wiring.required_connection: Search for all imports of useAudioEngine. Replace with useVellaUnifiedAudioEngine. Delete file after migration.

missing_wiring.issue: These legacy voice component files exist but are likely not imported. Should be verified and deleted if unused.
missing_wiring.required_connection: Search for imports of these files. If unused, delete them. If used, mark as deprecated and document migration path to LiquidVoiceStage.

missing_wiring.issue: Imports VELLA_SYSTEM_PROMPT from @/lib/ai/systemPrompt. Need to verify if systemPrompt.ts is deprecated or if this is correct.
missing_wiring.required_connection: Verify if systemPrompt.ts is deprecated. If deprecated, migrate agents.ts to use personaSynth instead. If not deprecated, confirm this is intentional for text-mode only.

missing_wiring.issue: Imports updateTonePreference and updateStyleBiasFromTone from localMemory but they are never called in the file.
missing_wiring.required_connection: Remove unused imports OR wire them if they should be called when tone changes (but this duplicates updateVellaSettings).

missing_wiring.issue: useEffect loads tone preference from loadLocalMemory() instead of userSettings.vella?.toneStyle.
missing_wiring.required_connection: Initialize selectedTone from userSettings.vella?.toneStyle ?? 'soft'. Remove loadLocalMemory() call for tone preference. Only use loadLocalMemory() for memoryProfile (emotional memory, patterns, etc.).

missing_wiring.issue: Voice HUD section shows checkboxes for moodChip, stability, deliveryHints, sessionTime but NOT tokenChip. However, tokenChip exists in VoiceHudSettings type and is used in session page.
missing_wiring.required_connection: Add checkbox for 'Show token usage chip' in Voice HUD settings. Wire to voiceHud.tokenChip.

outdated_logic.issue: handleSend() calls /api/conversation with hardcoded mode/defaults. Text mode conversation does not leverage realtime pipeline's mode detection or strategy planning.
outdated_logic.required_connection: If text mode should stay separate, document this. If text mode should use realtime pipeline, route through useRealtimeVella.

outdated_logic.issue: Uses VELLA_SYSTEM_PROMPT from deprecated systemPrompt.ts instead of personaSynth.buildPersonaInstruction().
outdated_logic.required_connection: Migrate to use personaSynth.buildPersonaInstruction() or document why text mode uses separate system prompt.

import_mismatches.issue: Imports type LiquidVoiceStageProps but doesn't use the type - just passes props directly.
import_mismatches.required_connection: Remove unused type import OR use it for prop validation.

import_mismatches.issue: Imports TONE_CONFIGS from @/lib/ai/tone but may not be using it (check if ToneSelector uses it internally).

unused_components.issue: Legacy tone selector component - may be unused if only components/ui/ToneSelector.tsx is used.
unused_components.verification_needed: Check if this file is imported anywhere. If not, delete it.

missing_subscriptions.issue: selectedTone state is not subscribed to userSettings.vella?.toneStyle changes. If settings change in another tab or from settings page, session page doesn't update.
missing_subscriptions.required_connection: Add useEffect to subscribe selectedTone to userSettings.vella?.toneStyle changes.

props_unused.issue: Props behaviourVector, monitoring are accepted but verification needed to ensure they are fully utilized in orb animation calculations.
props_unused.verification_status: Appears to be used (behaviourVector.warmthBias used on line 170, monitoring.tensionLoad used on line 172) - verify completeness.
